market_report: AI demand remains strong across hyperscaler and enterprise channels. Near-term supply remains constrained.
sentiment_report: Crowded optimism is rising and could become an invalidator if price runs far ahead of revisions.
news_report: Recent commentary points to sustained data center demand and ongoing product transition execution.
fundamentals_report: Revenue growth remains elevated and margins are resilient, but valuation requires discipline.

investment_debate_state.bull_history: Bull case: durable AI demand and operating leverage.
investment_debate_state.bear_history: Bear case: valuation and supply concentration risk.
investment_debate_state.current_response: The best long case depends on durable AI spending and margin resilience.
investment_debate_state.judge_decision: The research manager sees durable demand, but wants more confirmation on valuation and supply execution.

investment_plan: The research manager sees durable demand, but valuation remains demanding and needs confirmation.
trader_investment_plan: FINAL TRANSACTION PROPOSAL: BUY. Increase position sizing on pullbacks.

risk_debate_state.judge_decision: Hold off on immediate execution until valuation, liquidity, and catalyst timing are independently confirmed.

final_trade_decision: Rating: Overweight. Executive Summary: Gradually increase exposure with staged entries and risk limits. Investment Thesis: Durable demand remains favorable, but confirm valuation and supply chain execution.
